rulings.Case Title: DESIREE BARNES et al VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 1- DEFENDANT AMERICAN TECHNOLOGIES,INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to February 1, 2013. Moving party to comply with (1) San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the Fourth Amended Complaint; and (2) San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of reply filed on January 2, 2013 no later than January 18, 2013. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COURTNEY GREENE et al VS. MATTHEW KECK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFFs COURTNEY GREENE and EARL HATHAWAY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories. Off calendar per moving party. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY DOSS et al VS. THE WAYLAND LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT BRYANT PHUONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule 10 days to answer, failed to comply with CRC 3.1320(d). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY DOSS et al VS. THE WAYLAND LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANTs THE WAYLAND LLC, GUY FONG, WA LI and BRYANT PHUONG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny - sufficient re conscious disregard of rights and safety. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBRA FUTORIAN VS. DAN WALDMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANTs DAN WALDMAN, REGINA WALDMAN, SERGE BERGUIG, MAUD BERGUIG and POWELL STREET INVESTORS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREG SKINNER VS. EDWARD DEGUZMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANTs EDWARD DEGUZMAN and EDNA DEGUZMAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny as to Edward Deguzman disputed facts as number 11 and 13 (repair). Grant as to Edna Deguzman undisputed Edna is not in possession. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERLINDA SAN JUAN VS. JENNER E OCHOA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANTs BRENDA OCHOA and JENNER OCHOA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - 5 days to answer, court grants request for judicial notice. However parties raise facts that are not proper basis for demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TPM PROPERTIES, LLC VS. SAED NIJEM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Prior Order;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 09, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT SAED NIJEM's Motion For Reconsideration Of Prior Order. Hearing required. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of moving paper by 9am January 9, 2013. =(501/REQ)
